title: QTS File Upload Field (for Custom GPT)
description: Describes a file input on the job application form. GPT uses jobContext.jobDescription + candidate to produce JSON matching outputSchema, then submitTaskPackage; server renders PDF and extension uploads it.

stableFieldId.description: Stable DOM id for this upload control — use in submitTaskPackage.remainingFields if needed

documentSlot.description: Which document package key to generate

selectorHints.description: DOM locator hints captured by the extension

schemaId.description: JSON Schema file id the GPT must output for this slot

packageKey.description: Key on submitTaskPackage body for the generated JSON

generateFromJobDescription.description: When true, tailor document content to jobContext.jobDescription
